title: Premium Wall Panels supplier in Gurgaon
metatitle: Premium Wall Panel supplier in Gurgaon | Wholesale Supplier - Goals Floors
shortTitle: Wall Panel Price and Sizes in Gurgaon
shortDescription: Goals Floors is the leading wall panel supplier in Gurgaon. We provide 100% waterproof and termite-proof WPC, Charcoal, and PVC wall panels at wholesale prices for residential and commercial projects across Delhi NCR.
longDescription: The price of premium wall panels in Gurgaon ranges from ₹65 to ₹120 per square foot, depending on the material (WPC, PVC, or Charcoal) and thickness. As a direct wholesale supplier, Goals Floors offers the most competitive rates for 12mm charcoal louvers, 5mm PVC panels, and 17mm heavy WPC fluted panels.

features.title: 100% Damp-Proof Solution for Seelan
features.description: Gurugram and Delhi NCR homes frequently face wall dampness (seelan). Our advanced closed-cell polymer panels are 100% waterproof, immune to swelling, and permanently solve peeling paint and plaster issues in high-humidity areas, basements, and ground floors.

features.title: Termite-Proof & Architectural Durability
features.description: Engineered with high-density WPC and architectural-grade PVC, our panels are completely termite-proof—a crucial requirement for properties in Haryana. They withstand heavy foot traffic, maintaining structural integrity and aesthetic appeal for over 10-15 years.

features.title: Seamless 12-Inch Breadth & Rapid Installation
features.description: Our A+ grade PVC wall panels boast a substantial 12-inch width, dramatically minimizing visible seams. Combined with our precision tongue-and-groove interlocking system, this allows for flawless, hardware-free alignment and cuts installation time by half compared to traditional cladding.

features.title: India's First Fabric Texture & Pre-Finished Elegance
features.description: Pioneering tactile luxury, our exclusive panels introduce India's first authentic fabric texture. Arriving with premium scratch-resistant surface films, these panels are entirely pre-finished. They require zero post-installation painting or polishing, allowing for zero-downtime occupancy.

applications: Statement Wall Panels for Living Room & Lounge Spaces
Acoustic-Enhancing Wall Panels for TV Unit & Media Backdrops
Sophisticated Wall Panels for Office Receptions & Corporate Lobbies
Luxury Master Bedroom Paneling & Headboard Accents
Premium Retail Boutiques & Commercial Showroom Cladding
installation: Goals Floors provides end-to-end wall panel installation services across Gurugram and NCR. Whether mounting on leveled walls or utilizing a plywood grid for compromised surfaces, our professional team uses heavy-duty PU adhesive and concealed brad nails for a permanent, flawless finish.
maintenance: Our premium wall panels require near-zero maintenance. The high-grade surface films naturally repel dust and stains. Routine upkeep requires only a swift wipe with a dry microfiber cloth, preserving the pristine aesthetic of your walls without the need for chemical cleaners.

faqs.question: Which type of wall panel is best?
faqs.answer:
WPC (Wood Plastic Composite) wall panels are generally considered the best option for most modern homes and commercial spaces because they combine durability, moisture resistance, and premium aesthetics.

Key advantages of WPC panels:

* Resistant to moisture, termites, and warping.
* Available in wood, fluted, and decorative finishes.
* Require minimal maintenance compared to traditional wood.

For many projects in Gurugram and Delhi NCR, WPC panels are preferred because they perform well in varying humidity conditions and provide a premium appearance without the maintenance concerns of natural wood.

faqs.question: Is WPC 100% waterproof?
faqs.answer:
Yes, high-quality WPC wall panels are highly water-resistant and are commonly marketed as 100% waterproof for interior wall applications.

However, performance depends on:

* Product quality and manufacturing standards.
* Proper installation and sealing.
* Intended usage environment.

WPC panels are an excellent choice for areas prone to moisture, including kitchens and damp-prone apartment walls where occasional seelan can be a concern.

faqs.question: What is a WPC wall panel?
faqs.answer:
A WPC wall panel is a decorative wall cladding product made from a combination of wood fibers and thermoplastics.

WPC panels are designed to offer:

* The appearance of natural wood.
* Better moisture resistance than MDF or plywood.
* Long-term durability with low maintenance.

They are widely used for TV unit backdrops, feature walls, office interiors, and luxury residential projects.

faqs.question: Which is costly, PVC or WPC?
faqs.answer:
WPC wall panels are generally more expensive than PVC wall panels.

Typical comparison:

* PVC Panels: Budget-friendly and lightweight.
* WPC Panels: Premium finish and higher durability.
* Installation costs are usually similar, but material costs for WPC are higher.

If budget is the primary concern, PVC is often sufficient. If longevity and aesthetics matter more, WPC offers better long-term value.

faqs.question: What is the cost of PVC wall paneling in India?
faqs.answer:
In India, PVC wall paneling typically costs between ₹60 and ₹250 per sq. ft., depending on thickness, design, brand, and installation requirements.

Approximate pricing:

* Basic PVC Panels: ₹60–₹120/sq. ft.
* Mid-Range PVC Panels: ₹120–₹180/sq. ft.
* Premium Decorative PVC Panels: ₹180–₹250+/sq. ft.

Installation charges may be additional depending on site conditions and project size.

faqs.question: Is PVC panelling cheaper than tiles?
faqs.answer:
Yes, PVC wall paneling is usually cheaper than ceramic or vitrified wall tiles when both material and installation costs are considered.

Comparison:

* PVC panels typically cost less upfront.
* Installation is faster and cleaner.
* No cement, grout, or tile-cutting is usually required.

For budget-conscious renovations, PVC paneling often provides a more economical solution than traditional wall tiling.

faqs.question: Is PVC wall panel good for home?
faqs.answer:
Yes, PVC wall panels are a practical and cost-effective choice for homes, especially for bedrooms, living rooms, ceilings, and renovation projects.

Benefits include:

* Water-resistant and easy to clean.
* Quick installation with minimal mess.
* Available in various colors, textures, and wood-look finishes.

Many homeowners in Delhi NCR choose PVC panels to refresh interiors without the time and expense associated with conventional wall finishing methods.

faqs.question: What are the disadvantages of wall panels?
faqs.answer:
Wall panels offer many benefits, but they also have some limitations.

Common disadvantages:

* Lower-quality panels may fade or discolor over time.
* Some materials can be susceptible to scratches or impact damage.
* Premium panel systems can be more expensive than basic paint finishes.

Choosing the right material—such as WPC instead of low-grade PVC—can significantly reduce these drawbacks and improve long-term performance.

faqs.question: How much is a 4x8 sheet of PVC board?
faqs.answer:
A standard 4x8 ft PVC board in India typically costs between ₹1,500 and ₹6,000 per sheet, depending on thickness, density, and brand.

Approximate pricing:

* 5mm PVC Board: ₹1,500–₹2,500
* 10mm PVC Board: ₹2,500–₹4,000
* Premium High-Density PVC Board: ₹4,000–₹6,000+

Prices vary by region, supplier, and specification requirements.

faqs.question: Which is better, MDF or UPVC?
faqs.answer:
UPVC is generally better than MDF in areas exposed to moisture, while MDF is often preferred for premium painted furniture and decorative applications.

Comparison:

* UPVC: Waterproof, termite-resistant, low maintenance.
* MDF: Smooth surface and excellent paint finish.
* UPVC: Better for kitchens, bathrooms, and humid environments.

In many Gurugram apartments where humidity and occasional wall dampness are concerns, UPVC tends to offer better durability and lower maintenance than MDF.

installationSteps.title: Prepare the Canvas
installationSteps.description: Ensure the wall surface is optimally primed:
points: The plane must be structurally flat, immaculate, and free of debris.
Verify absolute dryness to maximize the high-performance adhesive bond.
installationSteps.tip: For compromised or uneven surfaces, we recommend mounting onto a precision plywood grid or leveling the plaster prior to application.

installationSteps.title: Measure & Calibrate
points: Execute precise measurements of the vertical space and cut the panels using a fine-toothed architectural saw.
Ensure all cuts maintain a strict 90-degree tolerance for an imperceptible fit.

installationSteps.title: Apply High-Performance Adhesive
installationSteps.description: Deploy premium-grade PU adhesive for maximum structural integrity:
points: Distribute the adhesive in a continuous zig-zag matrix across the panel's reverse side.
Maintain a 1-inch perimeter from all edges to prevent extrusion during mounting.

installationSteps.title: Engage & Conceal
points: Slide the tongue seamlessly into the groove of the preceding panel.
Apply firm, even pressure against the wall to activate the adhesive bond.
Fasten the concealed lip using brad nails to lock the architectural finish securely in place.

architectHeading: Why Gurgaon Architects Choose Our Wall Panels
